title: planchonella mindanaensis
intro: Planchonella mindanaensis, also known as the Maypuri tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and bark of the Planchonella mindanaensis plant are rich in antioxidants and have anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and bark can be used to make tea or infusions, and the plant is also used in traditional medicine to make topical applications such as creams and ointments.
